data.name: Japanese Mature: Sex Dreams
data.detailed_description:
Japanese Mature: Sex Dreams is the direct realization of your fantasies about MILF women. Meet experienced Japanese ladies who know exactly how to satisfy your needs.

Explore a collection of encounters with the most desirable Mature archetypes. Will your dream feature a submissive Secretary, a demanding Boss, a caring Nurse, or a devoted Housewife? Each one is waiting for your interaction.

Key Features:

  • 7 Unique Experiences: Discover seven different scenarios with Japanese Mature women.

  • Iconic Archetypes: Choose your fantasy: Office Boss, Secretary, Nurse, or Housewife.

  • Interactive Penetration: Use a dildo and toys to take control and pleasure them in VR.

  • Conversation System: Talk to each woman, learn more about her, and build tension before the intimacy begins.

  • Uncensored: Enjoy a full, unobstructed view in high-quality VR.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • 處理器: Intel Core i5-6600 (or equivalent)
  • 記憶體: 16 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: GeForce RTX 3060 (or equivalent)
  • 儲存空間: 15 GB 可用空間
  • VR 支援: SteamVR
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
